clerk_supervisor_note: Build the register for the six case numbers below. Live records, docket history, fee rows, financial obligations, attorney records, and Columbia stale exports may contain conflicts or older values. The register export should follow the attached template, including the audit fields needed for supervisor review.
matter_order_hint: Sort final register rows by case number.

matters.minute_summary: Restitution review closed. Existing criminal mischief disposition remains in force. No new plea was taken.

hearing_result.restitution_note: same amount as the active financial order

matters.local_caution: Bench card was routed with a similar-name alert; DOB was checked against the live case record.

matters.minute_summary: Final amended judgment signed from the June 29 setting. Count 1 dismissed, count 2 dismissed, count 3 remains in deferred-entry status. Probation continues for 12 months. Restitution amount remains on the signed judgment, with restitution review still pending.

hearing_result.restitution_note: same amount as the active financial order

matters.local_caution: Judge's cover sheet abbreviates counsel as OC and does not show appointment type.

matters.minute_summary: Defendant appeared. Bench warrant recalled. Plea accepted on the single failure-to-appear count, and judgment of conviction entered. No restitution and no probation were ordered.
matters.local_caution: A June stale roster listed the matter as open, while the live case still showed warrant status before the hearing.

matters.minute_summary: Prior June 1 judgment confirmed. No new plea or sentence modification. Financial review note asks clerk to verify the live ledger against the current Columbia criminal fee table.

hearing_result.restitution_note: same amount as the active financial order

matters.local_caution: Case carries a stale-export-conflict tag in the live record.

matters.minute_summary: Deferred entry from April 4 remains active. Treatment proof accepted for this review. No new financial assessment ordered.
matters.local_caution: Docket contains a correction entry after the April disposition.

matters.minute_summary: No-contest plea accepted on the single controlled-substance count. Judgment of conviction entered. Eighteen months probation ordered with treatment condition. No restitution ordered.
matters.local_caution: The live record still shows the prehearing attorney assignment.

counsel_desk_review_log.desk_note: Coverage desk sign-off; no change from the appearance record.

Counsel appeared for the warrant recall and plea.
Supervisor desk note says the coverage label remains correct for the June judgment.

fee_clerk_note: The finance desk scratch sheet is included for reconciliation only. Validate register amounts and fee labels against the shared clerk records before importing.
